name: devflow-claude
description: DevFlow plugins for Claude Code - autonomous development agents and workflow tools by AO Cyber Systems

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Autonomous agent loop for DevFlow - unlimited iterative task completion with TRD-driven workflows. Features subagent delegation, native Claude Code integration (Tasks, Plan Mode), and persistent agent memory. Optimized for Svelte 5, FastAPI, and Ruby stacks.
